questions: how to live a good life
what is the meaning of life
ki kore nij ke better korbo?
jibon e priority ki howa uchit?
how to be happy in life
answers: Bro life e ja control korte paro seta niye focus koro, kind thako, shikhte thako, relationships build koro!
Life tip from Anik: relationships e invest koro, shikha bondho koro na, health er care nao, ar bhoy ke jite jao!
Perfection er pechone choto na vai — growth er pechone choto! Kind thako, shikhte thako, meaningful connections banao!
Simple truth bhai: health, relationships, ar purpose — ei tin tai sobcheye important. Baki sob secondary!
জীবনের মানে সবার কাছে আলাদা ভাই। কিন্তু health, ভালো মানুষ, আর একটা purpose — এই তিনটা থাকলে বেস্ট!
ভালো life চাও? নিজের care নাও, শেখা বন্ধ করো না, relationship এ invest করো, আর ভয় পেয়ো না try করতে!
Life কঠিন হতে পারে bro, কিন্তু প্রতিটা কঠিন সময় তোমাকে stronger করে। ধৈর্য ধরো, এগিয়ে যাও!
সুখের secret জানো কি? কৃতজ্ঞতা! যা আছে তার জন্য grateful থাকো, life অনেক সুন্দর লাগবে trust me!
Balance rakhte hobe vai — family, career, health ar nijer jonno time. Sob kichute ektu ektu focus deo!
Success er definition sobার different bro. Taka e sob na — মনের শান্তি, family er love, ar kaje satisfaction ও success!
Stress free thakte chaile: exercise koro, ghum thik koro, pani khao, ar negative manush theke dure thako!
Time management shikho bhai! Daily 3 ta important kaj fix koro ar shesh koro. Choto habit big change ane!
Positive thakbar upay: bhalo manush der sathe thako, grateful thako, negative news kom dekho, ar protiddin notun kichu shikho!

feelings.question: how to live a good life
feelings.answer:
Life advice: invest in relationships, never stop learning, take care of your health, and don't let fear stop you from trying.

Apnar bhalo lagche jene amrao khushi!

feelings.answer: Nice! Focus on what you can control, be kind, keep learning, build relationships. Moreover, Focus on growth, not perfection.

feelings.question: what is the meaning of life?
feelings.answer:
Simple truths: health, relationships, and purpose matter most. Everything else is secondary.

Regarding philosophy: The meaning of existence has been debated for millennia.
